question: The concentrated urine is first formed when:
option1: NaCl is transported from the ascending limb of the Henle’s loop to the descending limb of the vasa recta.
option2: NaCl is transported from the descending limb of the Henle’s loop to the ascending limb of the vasa recta.
option3: The ascending limb of the vasa recta  transports NaCl to the interstitium.
remarks: Correct answer is "NaCl is transported from the ascending limb of the Henle’s loop to the descending limb of the vasa recta."
